homepage_text: Manage your team’s work, projects, & tasks online • Asana Supercharge your teams with AI that gets work done Give your teams AI that understands their work, keeps projects moving, and gets better the more your teams use it. pricing_text: Asana Pricing | Personal, Starter, Advanced, & Enterprise plans • Asana Pick the plan that fits your team Monthly Yearly Save up to 18% Personal For one or two people managing personal projects. $0 Free forever Get started Manage tasks and personal to-dos: check icon 2 users Up to 2 users can collaborate for free. Great for individuals or small teams starting out with Asana. check icon List, board & calendar views Visualize your work your way. Switch between a structured task list, a kanban-style board, or a calendar view — all in one project. check icon Unlimited tasks & projects Organize your work with unlimited tasks and projects. Tasks keep your to-dos on track; projects bring them together around bigger goals. check icon Activity logs Asana activity logs automatically track important changes to a task, giving teams visibility into task history and accountability. check icon Unlimited storage, 100MB per file Store an unlimited number of files, each up to 100MB in size, directly within Asana. check icon Basic search Find what you need, fast. Narrow down tasks by assignee, due date, project, or completion status to quickly surface the work that matters most. check icon Status updates Keep everyone informed by sharing regular progress updates on your projects, highlighting what's been accomplished and what's coming up. check icon iOS & Android mobile apps Asana offers iOS and Android apps for managing work on the go. check icon Time tracking with integrations Connect Asana to your favorite time tracking tools so you can see exactly how long tasks take and plan more accurately. check icon 100+ free integrations Connect Asana with the apps your team already uses, from Slack and Google Drive to Zoom and more. Starter For growing teams that need to track their projects' progress and hit deadlines. $10.99 Per user, per month billed annually Get started Purchase now arrow-right icon Everything in Personal, plus: check icon Asana AI Built-in AI that helps you draft tasks and status updates, build custom workflows, and deploy autonomous agents. check icon AI Studio (with additional credits for purchase) Use Asana's AI-powered builder to automate complex tasks, no coding needed. You can deploy your automations directly where your teams are already working. check icon Unlimited users Add as many team members as you need without hitting a cap or paying extra per person. check icon Timeline & Gantt views Timeline provides a clean, simplified scheduling view, while Gantt offers detailed project management features like task hierarchy and progress tracking. check icon Workflow builder Design and automate routine workflows with our no-code builder. to enhance efficiency and reduce manual effort. check icon Project dashboards Get a visual overview of your project's progress with charts and metrics that show how your work is tracking toward goals. check icon Universal reporting Pull data from all your projects and teams into one place to see the bigger picture of how work is progressing. check icon Advanced search Filter work by assignee, due date, status, attachments, and more -- then save searches as views for quick access. check icon Custom fields Add extra details to your tasks like priority levels, budgets, or approval status to track the information that matters most to your team. check icon Forms Collect information and requests through customizable forms that feed directly into Asana projects. check icon Unlimited rules Create as many automated rules as you need to handle assignments, notifications, and status updates automatically. check icon Start dates & times Set when work begins, not just when it's due. Schedule tasks across specific days and times for more accurate planning. check icon Custom project templates Create reusable templates tailored to your team's processes for consistent project setup. check icon Admin console IT and team admins have a centralized dashboard to manage team members, security settings, and permissions
